arts.ttl: Man Utd battle Arsenal as Mathys Tel makes transfer decision
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are both “in contact” with Mathys Tel as they look to complete a late deal for the Bayern Munich forward. The France U21 international has reportedly decided to leave the Allianz Arena before the January transfer window slams shut, and Arsenal and Man Utd are deemed to be the frontrunners in the race for his signature.

arts.ttl: I was fuming after Man City exit - now I'm hoping to prove Pep Guardiola wrong at Arsenal - football.london
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling could come up against Manchester City for the seventh time since his bitter departure when Arsenal face Pep Guardiola's side at the Emirates on Sunday. However, Sterling left City for Chelsea in July 2022 after growing frustrated with his game time under Guardiola.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Arsenal, Red Devils 'both pushing' for Bayern Munich prospect
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal are allegedly both making a sustained effort to sign Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: Spain's love swap... back! Former Man City star Ferran Torres 'reunites' with ex-girlfriend, who is the daughter of PSG manager Luis Enrique, after she traded him in for a team-mate
arts.sum: Martinez ended the relationship in May 2023 to focus on her career in dressage riding before reportedly dating Spanish Grand Prix motorcycle rider Alex Marquez and a Spanish defender.

arts.ttl: Report: What Arsenal have just found out after making contact with Mathys Tel's agents about signing him
Ethan Nwaneri has come to Mikel Arteta's rescue at the right time... if he features he will give Arsenal a different kind of threat against Man City
arts.sum: Last summer, the Arsenal first-team squad were asked which young player they thought will have a breakthrough season. Ethan Nwaneri was their unanimous answer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Man City live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City are at the Emirates Stadium to take on Arsenal in the Premier League this afternoon, with kick-off at 4.30pm.
